prompt: Revisá los logs de este diff...

assertions.name: cardnumber-pii-violation-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies logging of cardNumber as a security/PII violation

assertions.name: critical-severity-assigned
assertions.text: Output assigns CRITICAL severity to the cardNumber logging violation

assertions.name: entering-noise-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies 'Entering createPayment service method' as a noise/anti-pattern violation

assertions.name: async-mdc-violation-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies the TaskExecutor missing MDC/ContextSnapshot decorator as an architecture violation

assertions.name: controller-missing-start-end-detected
assertions.text: Output identifies that the controller method is missing START and END log entries

assertions.name: corrected-code-provided
assertions.text: Output provides corrected code for at least one of the violations
